trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Conflicting sentiment signals: extreme negative funding (short squeeze fuel) versus extreme long crowd (contrarian bearish). Ambiguous price levels make precise planning difficult.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h close above $1.48 after touching the entry zone, or bounce confirmation from $1.48-$1.50 zone.
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Bullish underlying trend (EMA, OI) combined with weak selling on pullback (price-volume divergence) and broad market contrarian fear provides a good setup. The extreme long L/S ratio is a counter signal, moderating the win rate.
